options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all or specified options to default value

options.name: -ilm
options.description: Specifies a view or corner name of an ILM to be mapped to top-level

options.name: -ilmCell
options.description: Specifies ILM cell name that has view or corner mapping to top-level

options.name: -keepAsync
options.description: Keep paths from asynchronous input ports

options.name: -keepFlatten
options.description: Instruct Innovus to keep in flattened state

options.name: -keepHighFanoutPorts
options.description: Keep high fanout input port paths

options.name: -keepInstInSdc
options.description: Keep instances which have constraints on it

options.name: -maxNumInsts
options.description: Specify the maximum number of instances per port (used to define high_fanout_ports)

options.name: -maxNumRegisters
options.description: Specify the maximum number of registers per port (used to define high_fanout_ports)

options.name: -top
options.description: Specifies view or corner name of top design analysis
